recommendations.title: The Son of Kong
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Action, Horror, Family, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Beleaguered adventurer Carl Denham returns to the island where he found King Kong.

recommendations.title: Mighty Joe Young
recommendations.overview: A young woman, Jill Young, grew up on her father's ranch in Africa, raising a large gorilla named Joe from an infant. Years later, she brings him to Hollywood to become a star.

recommendations.title: The Most Dangerous Game
recommendations.overview: When legendary hunter Bob Rainsford is shipwrecked on the perilous reefs surrounding a mysterious island, he finds himself the guest of the reclusive and eccentric Count Zaroff. While he is very gracious at first, Zaroff eventually forces Rainsford a

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Twin Peaks: Fire Walk with Me
recommendations.overview: In the questionable town of Deer Meadow, Washington, FBI Agent Desmond inexplicably disappears while hunting for the man who murdered a teen girl. The killer is never apprehended, and, after experiencing dark visions and supernatural encounters, Agen

recommendations.title: Stargate: The Ark of Truth
recommendations.overview: SG-1 searches for an ancient weapon which could help them defeat the Ori, and discover it may be in the Ori's own home galaxy. As the Ori prepare to send ships through to the Milky Way to attack Earth, SG-1 travels to the Ori galaxy aboard the Odysse

recommendations.title: Wonder Woman
recommendations.overview: An Amazon princess comes to the world of Man in the grips of the First World War to confront the forces of evil and bring an end to human conflict.

recommendations.title: Moana 2
recommendations.overview: After receiving an unexpected call from her wayfinding ancestors, Moana journeys alongside Maui and a new crew to the far seas of Oceania and into dangerous, long-lost waters for an adventure unlike anything she's ever faced.
recommendations.director: Dana Ledoux Miller, David G. Derrick Jr., Jason Hand

recommendations.title: KONOSUBA – God's blessing on this wonderful world! Legend of Crimson
recommendations.overview: After receiving a warning that Yunyun's hometown is in danger, Kazuma's party is relieved to discover it's only a joke...until it isn't. The Demon King's general has just arrived to obtain The Mage Killer, a weapon with world-ending power.

recommendations.title: One Cut of the Dead
recommendations.overview: Real zombies arrive and terrorize the crew of a zombie film being shot in an abandoned warehouse, said to be the site of military experiments on humans.
